titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Council of Latin American Studies, Yale University, Records
Council of Latin American Studies, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday October 6, 2018 at 10:13

did.unittitle: Council of Latin American Studies, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, memoranda, subject files, maintained by Chairman Richard McGee Morse, documenting the Yale Council on Latin American Studies. A vita of Richard M. Morse is included.

corpname.part: Yale Center for International and Area Studies. Council on Latin American Studies

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 37 (YRG 37), Records of associations, institutes, centers, and organizations affiliated with Yale.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is partially restricted. See inventory for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Council of Latin American Studies, Yale University, Records (RU 945). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by subject

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, memoranda, subject files, maintained by Chairman Richard McGee Morse, documenting the Yale Council on Latin American Studies. A vita of Richard M. Morse is included.

corpname.part: Yale Center for International and Area Studies. Council on African Studies

did.unittitle: Records of Richard Morse as Chairman

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restrictions are noted at the folder level

did.unittitle: City College, City University of New York
State University of New York, Stony Brook
Senior Appointment Committee in the Social Sciences
Publishers: Scott Foresman and Co. (Latin American Series)
University Committee on Latin American Policy
U of F Press: From Community to Metropolis
PRAXIS. Journal of City Government and Community Affairs
North Carolina, The University of (Chapel Hill)
University of Pittsburgh Department of History
State University of New York, Plattsburgh
Pan American Institute of Geography and History. Department of State
